checks.description: parent_phone does not look like a phone number (e.g. contains an email address).
session_attended_min is missing (kept as missing, not treated as zero).
practice_questions above 60 in a single day — kept, flagged as an anomaly (may be a real cramming burst).
A quiz score is recorded before Quiz 1's date (2025-10-10).
Note's facilitator_email does not match the student's assigned facilitator in student_metadata. Retained, but excluded from parent communication and qualitative risk contribution until trusted.

Note text names a different student than the one it's filed under (e.g. mentions "Ahmad" on a note attached to a student named "Omar"). We cannot tell whether the note's student_id or the roster name is the one that's wrong, only that they disagree — retained, but excluded from parent communication and qualitative risk contribution until verified.
